_doc: Error logs for the failing job. The executor logs surface only the raw exit code 0xE0434352 and a note that the running robot version reports OS codes rather than managed exceptions. The real exception is captured in the execution traces, not here.

Data.Message: Job 'aacc44ee-55ff-66aa-77bb-88cc99001122' faulted. System.Exception: Job stopped with an unexpected exit code: 0xE0434352

[Robot] Executor process exited with code 0xE0434352 (CLR unhandled managed exception). This robot version (23.4.0-robot) reports the OS process exit code; upgrade the robot to surface the underlying .NET exception directly. Inspect execution traces for the managed exception detail.
